## Describe the Bug
A clear description of the problem.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Browser (if UI): [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Are Gemini/Groq API keys configured? [yes/no]

## Logs / Screenshots
Paste relevant logs or attach screenshots.
